\tzpentry{ID4455}{Permittivity Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4455 introduces Permittivity Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\epsilon_T = \epsilon_0 \cdot \exp\left( \frac{\alpha_T}{\chi_T} \cdot \frac{V(\phi)}{P_T} \right) \equiv \frac{1}{\mu_0 c_{\text{eff}}^2(r)}$$
